---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Academic & Professional Work"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Projects"
    toc-depth: 2
---

## 🎓 Academic Projects

### Ontario Airport — Measuring Community Engagement ROI
**MSDM Capstone Project** · Cal Poly Pomona
`Fall 2025 – Summer 2026`

> Developing a data-driven framework to measure and justify the ROI of community engagement for Ontario International Airport (ONT).

**Client:** Ontario International Airport — Community Engagement Team

**The Challenge:**
ONT's Community Engagement Team is highly active at events, sponsorships, and civic collaborations — but lacked a way to quantify the revenue impact of these efforts.

**What I'm doing:**
- Developing metrics and models linking engagement activities to business outcomes
- Identifying leading indicators that predict long-term revenue growth
- Exploring cross-industry ROI measurement frameworks
- Proposing geotargeting and digital methods to track post-event audience behavior

**Methods:** Descriptive analytics · Predictive analytics · Surveys & Interviews · SEO · Dashboard Design

**Timeline:**

| Phase | Period | Focus |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Phase 1 | Fall 2025 | Research instruments, data collection |
| Phase 2 | Spring 2026 | Data analysis, KPIs, ROI framework |
| Phase 3 | Summer 2026 | Public report, final presentation |

**Skills Gained:**
- Marketing research & analytics
- Data modeling and visualization
- Digital marketing attribution (geotargeting, campaign analytics)
- Survey/interview design
- SEO & web publishing

---

### Virtual and Augmented Reality in Digital Marketing
**Major Project** · Amity University
`Aug 2023 – Jan 2024`

Explored the role of VR and AR technologies in modern digital marketing strategies,
analyzing how immersive experiences impact consumer behavior and brand engagement.

---

### Gamification in Digital Marketing
**Minor Project** · Amity University
`Feb 2023 – Jun 2023`

Investigated how gamification techniques can be applied in digital marketing campaigns
to boost user engagement, retention, and conversion rates.
